name: athena
description: Workflow orchestrator: brainstorm, plan, build (per-task two-stage review + wave verification), debug, review, ship. 17 skills, 6 agents, smart routing, enforced gates.

interface.shortDescription: Active multi-agent coordination with enforced discipline for coding agents
interface.longDescription: Athena is a full-lifecycle workflow orchestrator. Brainstorm → plan → build → debug → review → ship. The build phase runs per-task two-stage review (spec compliance, then quality) plus wave-level verification. State persists in .athena-state.json with atomic writes and corruption recovery. Smart router infers the right workflow from natural language.
defaultPrompt: I want to build a new feature.
Review this code before I merge.
